Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 85 

57 = Non-residential Substance Abuse Treatment Facility. A location which provides treatment for 
substance (alcohol and drug) abuse on an ambulatory basis. Services include individual and 
group therapy and counseling, family counseling, laboratory tests, drugs and supplies, and 
psychological testing. 
58 = Non-residential Opioid treatment facility 
59 = Unassigned. N/A 
60 =
